author: śrīla narottama⋅dāsa ṭhākura
verses:
śrī⋅guru⋅caraṇa⋅padma, kevala bhakati⋅sadma,
vando muñi sāvadhāna⋅mate
jā̐hāra prasāde bhāi, e bhava tariyā jāi,
kṛṣṇa⋅prāpti haya jā̐hā ha’te

guru⋅mukhapadma⋅vākya, cittete kariyā aikya,
āra nā kariha mane āśā
śrī⋅guru⋅caraṇe rati, ei sei uttamā gati,
je⋅prasāde pūre sarva āśā

cakṣu⋅dāna dilā jei, janme janme prabhu sei,
divyajñāna hṛde prakāśita
prema⋅bhakti jā̐hā haite, avidyā vināśa jāte,
vede gāya jā̐hāra carita

śrī⋅guru karuṇā⋅sindhu, adhama janāra bandhu,
‘lokanātha’ lokera jīvana
hā hā prabho! kara dayā, deha’ more pada⋅chāyā,
tuyā pade loinu śaraṇa
en_translation:
The lotus feet of the spiritual master are the sole abode of devotion; I worship them with great care. By his mercy, O brother, we cross over this material existence, and the attainment of Kṛṣṇa occurs through him.

Making the words from the lotus mouth of the spiritual master one with my heart, I have no other desire. Love for the feet of the spiritual master is the supreme destination; by his mercy, all desires are fulfilled.

He who has given the gift of spiritual vision is the master in every birth; divine knowledge is revealed in the heart. From him loving devotion comes, by which ignorance is destroyed; the Vedas sing his glories.

The spiritual master is an ocean of mercy, a friend of the fallen souls; he is the master and the life of all people. O Lord! Be merciful, give me the shelter of your feet; I take refuge at your feet.
